_note: Machine-readable benchmark expectations for /report-review. Derived from Docs/WIP/2026-04-16_Benchmark_Report_Quality_Status_Matrix.md, with 2026-05-09 Captain correction removing erroneous MIXED acceptability for true-side Bolsonaro and asylum-current-total families, and correcting bundesrat-simple from the older mixed/leaning band to a high-true literal-chronology band. Update this file after each significant rerun wave — it is the mechanical source for bands; Docs/AGENTS/Captain_Quality_Expectations.md is the living narrative/comparator source. Historical WIP docs are supporting context only. Fields null = no verified expectation yet.
_noiseNote: Run-to-run variance on truthPercentage for a given input is typically ≤8%. Differences within this band are noise, not regression.

families.inputValue: Der Bundesrat unterschrieb den EU-Vertrag rechtskräftig bevor Volk und Parlament darüber entschieden haben
families.qualityStatusNote: Stage 1 contract/anchor failure fixed. Current isolated rerun f8e72c84fb004f23945e23c81973fc26 on 2026-05-10 succeeded as LEANING-FALSE 32/80 with 3 AtomicClaims, 5 boundaries, 88 evidence items, and no user-visible warnings; Captain accepted it as good. Truth 32 is 3 points below the nominal band minimum but inside the 8-point noise tolerance. Semantic polish on the rechtskräftig anchor may still vary across runs.
families._failed_rerun_2026-04-16: Rerun 4177998a at HEAD 35a22fba returned UNVERIFIED 50/0 with 0 evidence items, 0 boundaries, 12 LLM calls. Root cause: Stage 2 evidence extraction timed out (467 Fix3 LLM timeouts logged that day; 5 jobs submitted concurrently). NOT treated as a regression — needs isolated single-job rerun to confirm qualityStatus.
knownOpenIssues: semantic precision on rechtskräftig anchor — claim shape still slightly variable
latest accepted rerun sits just below the nominal truth band but within repository noise tolerance

families.inputValue: Der Bundesrat unterschrieb den EU-Vertrag bevor Volk und Parlament darüber entschieden haben
families.qualityStatusNote: Captain correction on 2026-05-09: simple wording is a literal chronology claim. High-true reports are preferred when they state that signature before parliamentary/popular approval happened while caveating that signature is not final democratic approval. Preferred exact local comparators: a6b0e0fc14984926a678a462456bc110 and a53573047fe64778a76e53cb578900c7. These are comparator/expectation anchors, not proof of current HEAD quality.
knownOpenIssues: no clean current-HEAD rerun after the 2026-05-09 expectation correction; use preferred comparators for report shape, not runtime proof

families.inputValue: Mehr als 235 000 Personen aus dem Asylbereich sind zurzeit in der Schweiz
families.qualityStatusNote: Must be true-side. Captain correction on 2026-05-09 removed prior MIXED allowance; caveats about source retrieval, freshness, threshold closeness, or incomplete current component tables belong in confidence/reasoning, not a neutral or false-side verdict direction. Latest current stability canary aaaa8f6572c14b2bb3593866e1eefde5 passed in band as MOSTLY-TRUE 75/68 with one claim, 6 boundaries, 45 evidence items, and no user-visible warnings. Still watch residual narrative component reconstruction and prior stability variance.
families._note_rerun_2026-04-16: Rerun e5becebe at HEAD 35a22fba returned MOSTLY-TRUE 78/68. Truth 78 is 3 pts above band max 75 — within 8-pt noise tolerance. Band held; no adjustment needed. Higher confidence (68) is a positive signal.
knownOpenIssues: two post-fix current passes now exist, but the latest is at the upper truth-band edge and the family still has prior false-side stability history
residual narrative can still use component reconstruction as uncertainty context; it must not become decisive support or contradiction unless the source supplies a complete non-overlapping aggregate
MIXED is not acceptable for this family; close-threshold caveats belong in confidence/reasoning, not verdict direction

prior current-stack stability rerun 511c2b17299a49a5a9640505c40eac0f fetched current XLSX/RU sheets but regressed false-side by stitching component tables into an agent-composed total instead of using one clean official SEM aggregate

families.inputValue: 235000 Flüchtlinge leben in der Schweiz, das sind fast so viel im am Ende des Zweiten Weltkrieges.
families.qualityStatusNote: First exact current-stack pair on 2026-05-10 established a false-side band: 9e1f0f0014564edeaa0e673b43dc27e6 returned MOSTLY-FALSE 25/73 and ce265797d3fc4540a45aaeac99510e4a returned LEANING-FALSE 30/63. Reports should distinguish the current SEM/asylum-area 235k component, which may be true-side or definition-caveated, from the historical comparison. The dominant historical claim is endpoint stock at the end of WWII, not cumulative wartime admissions/flows; using cumulative flows as support is a regression.
knownOpenIssues: first band is based on two exact same-stack runs; keep watch until Captain accepts or a later spot-check confirms stability
AC_01 current 235k subclaim can vary by definition between SEM asylum-area aggregate and narrower refugee counts, but AC_02 historical endpoint comparison should dominate the article verdict
reports must treat 'am Ende des Zweiten Weltkrieges' as endpoint stock, not cumulative wartime admissions or flows
some reports can cite current-count evidence as support for the historical comparison bucket; citation/directness cleanliness remains a review item
weak local report 808e6f8ac29a4850b10ff04c9c534d85 is excluded as a comparator because it appears to use cumulative WWII admissions as support for an endpoint-stock comparison

families.inputValue: Did the legal proceedings against Jair Bolsonaro comply with Brazilian law, and did the proceedings and the verdicts meet international standards for a fair trial?
families.qualityStatusNote: Must be true-side with caveats. Captain correction on 2026-05-09 removed prior MIXED allowance; original Bolsonaro expectation records legal basis as strongly supported and procedural fairness as largely supported with legitimate concerns. Current exact canary 8761ab59a825430ab3bd2ae325dc4573 on 5dc1d675 passed overall and preserved the intended 3-claim split: AC_01 MOSTLY-TRUE 74/63, AC_02 LEANING-TRUE 58/48, AC_03 LEANING-TRUE 62/44. Keep watch because AC_03 confidence is just below the family band if assessed claim-by-claim, and one claim-local citation registry warning remains admin-only.
families._note_rerun_2026-04-16: Rerun da3580fe (PT variant, not EN) confirmed LEANING-TRUE 58/61 at HEAD 35a22fba — see bolsonaro-pt entry for EN twin confirmation.
knownOpenIssues: current pass is one exact canary, not repeated stability closure
one state.gov preliminary-search candidate remains, but it was not selected for fetch and extracted zero evidence in latestVerifiedJobId
AC_03 confidence 44 is below the family confidence band if judged at individual-claim level, while overall report confidence is in band
MIXED or false-side outcomes are regressions unless backed by strong target-specific evidence that overturns the original legal-basis/fairness expectation

families.inputValue: O processo judicial contra Jair Bolsonaro por tentativa de golpe de Estado respeitou o direito processual brasileiro e os requisitos constitucionais, e as sentencas proferidas foram justas
families.qualityStatusNote: Must be true-side with caveats. Captain correction on 2026-05-09 removed prior MIXED allowance; original Bolsonaro expectation records legal basis as strongly supported and procedural fairness as largely supported with legitimate concerns. Direct rerun da3580fe at HEAD 35a22fba confirms LEANING-TRUE 58.2/61. Language-agnostic fixes transferred correctly from EN variant.
knownOpenIssues: MIXED or false-side outcomes are regressions unless backed by strong target-specific evidence that overturns the original legal-basis/fairness expectation
ACS must not drop the sentence-justice/verdict-fairness clause as mere opinion; reports with only two selected/final claims are structurally incomplete even when the top-line verdict is in band

families.inputValue: Using hydrogen for cars is more efficient than using electricity
families.qualityStatusNote: TTW/WTW conflation fixed. Report now correctly exposes distinct full-pathway and tank-to-wheel claims/boundaries. Cleanup territory — no active firefighting needed.

Stage 4 advocate parse-failure fixed and the 2026-05-10 operational stale-watchdog failure is repaired by runner heartbeat commit 37554ace. Current clean job 38655e2b60d24aaf93ea16d044d1a1c4 succeeded as MIXED 52/68 with 3 claims, 6 boundaries, 124 evidence items, and heartbeat events. Report-quality calibration remains open because truth 52 is above the 10-35 expected truth band.
